'''powadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhabdiferous|rhabdiferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhabdiferous|rhabdiferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| powadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:powadithi|powadithi]] || [[word:powadiji|powadiji]] || [[word:powadishi|powadishi]] || [[word:powadiki|powadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:powaduthuthu|powaduthuthu]] || [[word:powadujuju|powadujuju]] || [[word:powadushushu|powadushushu]] || [[word:powadukuku|powadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:powaduthu|powaduthu]] || [[word:powaduju|powaduju]] || [[word:powadushu|powadushu]] || [[word:powaduku|powaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:powadufthuf|powadufthuf]] || [[word:powadufjuf|powadufjuf]] || [[word:powadufshuf|powadufshuf]] || [[word:powadufkuf|powadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:powadethe|powadethe]] || [[word:powadeje|powadeje]] || [[word:powadeshe|powadeshe]] || [[word:powadeke|powadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:powadothotho|powadothotho]] || [[word:powadojojo|powadojojo]] || [[word:powadoshosho|powadoshosho]] || [[word:powadokoko|powadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:powadotho|powadotho]] || [[word:powadojo|powadojo]] || [[word:powadosho|powadosho]] || [[word:powadoko|powadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:powadofthof|powadofthof]] || [[word:powadofjof|powadofjof]] || [[word:powadofshof|powadofshof]] || [[word:powadofkof|powadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:powadÃŸfthÃŸf|powadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfjÃŸf|powadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfshÃŸf|powadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfkÃŸf|powadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:powadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|powadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|powadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|powadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|powadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:powadÃŸfthÃŸf|powadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfjÃŸf|powadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfshÃŸf|powadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfkÃŸf|powadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:powadÃŸfthÃŸf|powadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfjÃŸf|powadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfshÃŸf|powadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:powadÃŸfkÃŸf|powadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:powadÃḊthÃḊ|powadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:powadÃḊjÃḊ|powadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:powadÃḊshÃḊ|powadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:powadÃḊkÃḊ|powadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:powadathatha|powadathatha]] || [[word:powadajaja|powadajaja]] || [[word:powadashasha|powadashasha]] || [[word:powadakaka|powadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:powadatha|powadatha]] || [[word:powadaja|powadaja]] || [[word:powadasha|powadasha]] || [[word:powadaka|powadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:powadafthaf|powadafthaf]] || [[word:powadafjaf|powadafjaf]] || [[word:powadafshaf|powadafshaf]] || [[word:powadafkaf|powadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:powadasha|powadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:powadshÃḋsha|powadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powadrosha|powadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powadmusha|powadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:powadyasha|powadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowadnkshÃḋsha|gopowadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowadnkrosha|gopowadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowadnkmusha|gopowadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowadnkyasha|gopowadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:powawadasha|powawadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powawadshÃḋsha|powawadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powawadrosha|powawadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powawadmusha|powawadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powawadyasha|powawadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowawadnkshÃḋsha|gopowawadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowawadnkrosha|gopowawadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowawadnkmusha|gopowawadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowawadnkyasha|gopowawadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pewÃḊdasha|pewÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pewÃḊdshÃḋsha|pewÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pewÃḊdrosha|pewÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pewÃḊdmusha|pewÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pewÃḊdyasha|pewÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gopewÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopewÃḊdnkrosha|gopewÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopewÃḊdnkmusha|gopewÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopewÃḊdnkyasha|gopewÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:powfadasha|powfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:powfadshÃḋsha|powfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:powfadrosha|powfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:powfadmusha|powfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:powfadyasha|powfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopowfadnkshÃḋsha|gopowfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopowfadnkrosha|gopowfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopowfadnkmusha|gopowfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopowfadnkyasha|gopowfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
